hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】从初创公司到 1.8 万亿美元：抓住 SpaceX 机会的投资者现在获得了回报；【FINANCE】尽管通胀担忧加剧，金价仍跌至 6 个月低点。这就是金条失宠的原因；【WORLD】随波逐流还是故意？ - 解读特朗普的伊朗战略。

items.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
items.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.
items.title_zh: 从初创公司到 1.8 万亿美元：抓住 SpaceX 机会的投资者现在获得了回报
items.summary_zh: 随着 SpaceX 寻求近 1.8 万亿美元的 IPO 估值，早期押注有望创造风险投资历史上最大的账面收益。

items.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
items.summary: The yellow metal is at its lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices.
items.title_zh: 尽管通胀担忧加剧，金价仍跌至 6 个月低点。这就是金条失宠的原因
items.summary_zh: 由于潜在利率上升和技术信号不稳定对价格造成压力，黄金正处于今年的最低水平。

items.title: Flip flop or deliberate? - Unpacking Trump’s strategy on Iran
items.summary: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue looks at the US president's mixed messaging over the war and the questions it raises.
items.title_zh: 随波逐流还是故意？ - 解读特朗普的伊朗战略
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的加里·奥多诺霍 (Gary O'Donoghue) 探讨了美国总统关于战争及其引发的问题的复杂信息。

items.title: Live updates: Bitcoin traders eye rally to $75,000, Japan set to hike rate to 31-year high
items.summary: Crypto firmed across the board following the largest equity listing in history. The token most tied to Elon Musk traded right in line with the market.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：比特币交易员预计将涨至 75,000 美元，日本将加息至 31 年来的高点
items.summary_zh: 在历史上最大的股票上市之后，加密货币全面走强。与埃隆·马斯克关系最密切的代币的交易与市场完全一致。

items.title: BlackRock files 8-A for yield-bearing bitcoin ETF; analyst expects launch next week
items.summary: Bloomberg Analyst Eric Balchunas said the filing signals an imminent launch, adding that he expects it to start trading next week.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德为有收益的比特币 ETF 提交 8-A 申请；分析师预计下周推出
items.summary_zh: 彭博社分析师埃里克·巴尔丘纳斯 (Eric Balchunas) 表示，该文件表明该产品即将推出，并补充说他预计该产品将于下周开始交易。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Tense Calm Grips Mideast as Trump Again Claims Deal Is Close
items.summary: President Trump said he had called off new attacks on Iran and that a peace agreement could be signed this weekend. A spokesman for Iran’s foreign ministry said, “Nothing has been finalized.”
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普再次声称协议已接近，中东局势紧张平静
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，他已取消对伊朗的新袭击，并可能在本周末签署和平协议。伊朗外交部发言人表示，“一切尚未最终确定。”

items.title: While bitcoin holds near $63,000, some data points to pain ahead for bulls
items.summary: Onchain data shows the bitcoin market price is only just above its realized price and demand is weakening, especially from ETFs.
items.title_zh: 尽管比特币维持在 63,000 美元附近，但一些数据表明多头将面临痛苦
items.summary_zh: 链上数据显示，比特币市场价格仅略高于其实际价格，需求正在减弱，尤其是来自 ETF 的需求。

items.title: Metaplanet buys Siiibo Securities to accelerate bitcoin financial ecosystem plans
items.summary: The approximately $13.1 million acquisition gives Metaplanet a regulated securities platform to develop Bitcoin-linked investment products.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 收购 Siiibo Securities 以加速比特币金融生态系统计划
items.summary_zh: 此次约 1310 万美元的收购为 Metaplanet 提供了一个受监管的证券平台，用于开发与比特币相关的投资产品。

items.title: There's one simple way to tell whether bitcoin has really bottomed. Right now, it hasn't.
items.summary: Bitcoin's weekly RSI contains a critical level that has reliably separated bull and bear market regimes across multiple cycles. Right now, the indicator has yet to clear that line.
items.title_zh: 有一种简单的方法可以判断比特币是否真的已经触底。现在还没有。
items.summary_zh: 比特币的每周 RSI 包含一个关键水平，可以可靠地将多个周期的牛市和熊市制度分开。目前，该指标尚未突破该线。

items.title: BlackRock files to list its bitcoin income ETF, with expected debut next week
items.summary: An 8-A share registration filing, in this case for Nasdaq, is usually one of the last steps before an ETF goes live.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德提交比特币收入 ETF 上市申请，预计下周首次亮相
items.summary_zh: 8-A 股注册备案（本例中为纳斯达克）通常是 ETF 上线前的最后步骤之一。

items.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs set to hit $2 trillion cumulative trading volume milestone amid mounting outflows
items.summary: BlackRock's IBIT dominates spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds by trading volume, with a current 73.7% market share.
items.title_zh: 在资金流出不断增加的情况下，美国现货比特币 ETF 累计交易量将达到 2 万亿美元里程碑
items.summary_zh: 按交易量计算，贝莱德的 IBIT 在现货比特币交易所交易基金中占据主导地位，目前市场份额为 73.7%。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: KKR says AI productivity boom to keep on going — but warns of 'extreme' trend not seen since the 19th century
items.summary: KKR said in its mid-year outlook Thursday that AI will drive economic growth for years to come, but only in specific sectors.
items.title_zh: KKR 表示人工智能生产力繁荣将持续下去，但警告称，可能会出现 19 世纪以来从未出现过的“极端”趋势
items.summary_zh: KKR 在周四的年中展望中表示，人工智能将在未来几年推动经济增长，但仅限于特定领域。

items.title: Citigroup shares outperform down market after Trump endorsement
items.summary: Jane Fraser-led Citi fell 1%, less than the rest of the market and some other major banks, after Trump lauded its turnaround in a social media post.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持后，花旗集团股价跑赢下跌市场
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普在社交媒体帖子中赞扬花旗集团的转变后，简·弗雷泽领导的花旗集团股价下跌 1%，跌幅低于市场其他股票和其他一些主要银行。

items.title: Regulators' proposed prediction markets rules ban trading on terrorism, assassinations
items.summary: The proposed rules from the commission will now face a public comment period.
items.title_zh: 监管机构提议的预测市场规则禁止恐怖主义、暗杀交易
items.summary_zh: 该委员会拟议的规则现在将面临公众意见征询期。

items.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims deal to end Iran war near
items.summary: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.
items.title_zh: 特朗普声称即将达成结束伊朗战争的协议后，德黑兰表示“没有任何敲定”
items.summary_zh: 伊朗表示，在美国总统表示已经达成结束冲突的“伟大解决方案”后，有关达成协议的报道是“推测性的”。

items.title: Why the economics make this the craziest World Cup ever
items.summary: From trade wars to soaring ticket prices, the 2026 World Cup is unlike any before it. Faisal Islam explores what this tournament reveals about our changing global economy.
items.title_zh: 为什么经济因素让这届世界杯成为史上最疯狂的世界杯
items.summary_zh: 从贸易战到飞涨的票价，2026 年世界杯与以往任何一届世界杯都不同。费萨尔·伊斯兰 (Faisal Islam) 探讨了本次锦标赛揭示的不断变化的全球经济。

items.title: Deadly Sudan drone strike targets funeral procession
items.summary: Rights groups accuse the RSF paramilitary group of killing civilians in el-Obeid, a city on the civil war's front line.
items.title_zh: 苏丹致命无人机袭击送葬队伍
items.summary_zh: 人权组织指责无国界医生组织准军事组织在内战前线城市奥贝德杀害平民。

items.title: A Dangerous Limbo Leaves Iran, and the World, Between Peace and War
items.summary: Since announcing a nominal cease-fire two months ago, Iran, Israel and the U.S. have remained locked in low-intensity violence that has become a new normal.
items.title_zh: 伊朗和世界陷入和平与战争之间的危险边缘
items.summary_zh: 自两个月前宣布名义停火以来，伊朗、以色列和美国一直处于低强度暴力之中，这已成为一种新常态。

items.title: XRP jumps 3% above $1.14 as institutional buying meets key resistance test
items.summary: XRP posted its strongest session in days on a sharp volume surge, though traders remain focused on whether the rally can break a longer-term downtrend that still points lower.
items.title_zh: 随着机构购买遇到关键阻力测试，XRP 上涨 3%，突破 1.14 美元
items.summary_zh: XRP 因成交量大幅飙升而创下数日来最强劲的交易日，但交易员仍关注此次反弹能否打破仍指向较低的长期下降趋势。

items.title: SpaceX's crypto-traded IPO was sharply falling. It now points upward to a $2.4 trillion valuation
items.summary: The SPCX perpetual on Hyperliquid has bounced from this week’s lows, while Bloomberg says other shadow markets now imply a first-day gain of more than 35%.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的加密交易 IPO 大幅下滑。现在估值高达 2.4 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 上的 SPCX 永续合约已从本周低点反弹，而彭博社表示，其他影子市场现在意味着首日涨幅将超过 35%。

items.title: Ethena Labs to allocate $250 million to Securitize’s Tokenized AAA CLO Fund as it deploys on Solana
items.summary: STAC is one of Securitize’s in-house offerings that provides onchain access to institutional-grade, floating-rate structured credit.
items.title_zh: Ethena Labs 将向 Securitize 的代币化 AAA CLO 基金拨款 2.5 亿美元，以部署 Solana
items.summary_zh: STAC 是 Securitize 的内部产品之一，提供对机构级浮动利率结构性信贷的链上访问。

items.title: Avalanche Treasury shares fall 38% on Nasdaq debut after $675 million merger
items.summary: The company intends to accelerate the growth of the Avalanche ecosystem and plans to acquire over $1 billion worth of AVAX over time.
items.title_zh: 价值 6.75 亿美元的合并后，Avalanche Treasury 股价在纳斯达克上市下跌 38%
items.summary_zh: 该公司打算加速 Avalanche 生态系统的发展，并计划随着时间的推移收购价值超过 10 亿美元的 AVAX。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #105.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：特朗普官方 (TRUMP)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 105。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 162。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: There is a ‘fundamental clash’ between bitcoin and institutionalization, says BTC circular economy project founder
items.summary: Bitcoin Ekasi's Hermann Vivier emphasized that bitcoin's store-of-value narrative does not exist without usage as a medium of exchange.
items.title_zh: BTC循环经济项目创始人表示，比特币与制度化之间存在“根本性冲突”
items.summary_zh: Bitcoin Ekasi 的 Hermann Vivier 强调，如果不用作交换媒介，比特币的价值存储叙述就不存在。

items.title: Bitwise’s Dragosch sees up to 20% further downside for bitcoin, puts ‘max pain’ scenario at $48,000
items.summary: Bitwise's Dragosch sees up to 20% more bitcoin downside, with the long-term holder cost basis at $48,000 the "max pain" scenario.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 的 Dragosch 预计比特币将进一步下跌 20%，将“最大痛苦”情景定为 48,000 美元
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 的 Dragosch 认为比特币的下行空间最多可达 20%，长期持有成本基础为 48,000 美元，这是“最大痛苦”的情况。

items.title: Metaplanet to acquire Siiibo Securities for $13 million to develop bitcoin-linked yield products
items.summary: Metaplanet CEO Simon Gerovich said the deal is expected to close in July, and the company plans to rename the business Metaplanet Securities.
items.title_zh: Metaplanet 以 1300 万美元收购 Siiibo Securities 以开发与比特币挂钩的收益产品
items.summary_zh: Metaplanet 首席执行官 Simon Gerovich 表示，该交易预计将于 7 月完成，公司计划将业务更名为 Metaplanet Securities。

items.title: AI buildout weighs on bitcoin demand but future gains could reverse trend, Relai CEO says
items.summary: Julian Liniger, CEO of Relai, said the current bitcoin bear market is driven in part by liquidity absorbed by AI investments.
items.title_zh: Relai首席执行官表示，人工智能的发展对比特币需求造成压力，但未来的收益可能会扭转趋势
items.summary_zh: Relai首席执行官朱利安·利尼格(Julian Liniger)表示，当前的比特币熊市部分是由人工智能投资吸收的流动性推动的。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: Introducing North Mini Code: Cohere’s First Model For Developers
items.title_zh: North Mini Code 简介：Cohere 为开发人员提供的第一个模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
items.summary: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数已经对 SpaceX 股票进行了重大看涨，指数基金投资者需要知道这一点
items.summary_zh: 投资了数万亿退休储蓄的标准普尔 500 指数对 SpaceX 的 IPO 表示拒绝，这是历史上规模最大的 IPO。这对于投资组合意味着什么。

items.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
items.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 在纳斯达克首次公开募股中筹集了 750 亿美元创纪录的资金
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 以每股 135 美元的价格出售 555.6 股股票，筹集了 750 亿美元的资金，这是有记录以来最大规模的 IPO。

items.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
items.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 将零售 IPO 分配削减至 20%
items.summary_zh: 据一位知情人士透露，这家由埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司计划将 20% 左右的产品直接面向零售买家。

items.title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
items.summary: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies with a market value beyond $2 trillion.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员表示，SpaceX 首次亮相时的收盘价将突破 2 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的交易员认为 SpaceX 很可能会加入由六家公司组成、市值超过 2 万亿美元的行列。

items.title: North Carolina treasurer passes on SpaceX citing valuation concerns; favors OpenAI, Anthropic
items.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.
items.title_zh: 北卡罗来纳州财长以估值担忧为由放弃了 SpaceX；支持 OpenAI、Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 北卡罗来纳州对人工智能初创公司 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 进行了大量投资，同时避免直接持有 SpaceX 的股份。

items.title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after more than three years in coma
items.summary: Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the king's eldest daughter, collapsed in December 2022 while exercising her dogs.
items.title_zh: 泰国公主Bajrakitiyabha在昏迷三年多后去世
items.summary_zh: 国王的长女 Bajrakitiyabha 公主于 2022 年 12 月在遛狗时晕倒。

items.title: 'They destroyed the future': Palestinian anger at rise in Israeli demolitions in East Jerusalem
items.summary: Palestinian homes are being pulled down in occupied East Jerusalem to make way for a park.

items.summary_zh: 在被占领的东耶路撒冷，巴勒斯坦人的房屋正在被拆除，为公园让路。

items.title: World Cup kicks off in Mexico with Shakira, dancing, and protests
items.summary: There was a star-studded opening ceremony, and some sporadic clashes between police and protesters around the Azteca stadium.

items.title: Nigeria evacuates citizens from South Africa as anti-migrant sentiment rises
items.summary: Nigeria is the latest African state to repatriate citizens following reports of xenophobic attacks.

items.summary_zh: 尼日利亚是最新一个在接到仇外袭击报告后遣返公民的非洲国家。

items.title: Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup role
items.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan is appointed to take charge of the Uefa Super Cup match between Paris St-Germain and Aston Villa later this summer after being denied a spot at the World Cup.

items.summary_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦在被拒绝参加世界杯后，被任命负责今年夏天晚些时候巴黎圣日耳曼队和阿斯顿维拉队之间的欧洲超级杯比赛。

items.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
items.summary: The Pope is appealing for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.

items.summary_zh: 教宗呼吁对寻求更好生活的移民采取人道的态度和尊重的欢迎。

items.summary: The opening game in Mexico City took place amid weeks of protests from groups including teachers’ unions complaining about pay and pensions.

items.title: Bring the Kids and Grab Some Barbecue: A Day at the Ukrainian Drone Races
items.summary: Competitions that give soldiers a brief break from the front have a festival-like atmosphere, a mix of potentially deadly weapons and frolicking children.

items.title: U.S. Plan Is Said to Pull a Third of Fighter Jets It Provides NATO for Europe
items.summary: The plan, outlined by officials and in a written document, provides rare clarity about the extent to which the Trump administration intends to reduce its commitment to NATO.

items.title: A Globe-Spanning Collection of Children’s Art May Lose Its Home
items.summary: For 40 years, a museum in Norway has showcased art by children from around the world, even toddlers. Now it has lost the state support it depended on.

items.summary_zh: 40 年来，挪威的一家博物馆一直展示来自世界各地的儿童（甚至是幼儿）的艺术作品。现在它已经失去了赖以生存的国家支持。

items.title: ‘Operation Pushkin’: Paris Trial Puts Spotlight on Rare-Book Heists
items.summary: One by one, valuable works by Russian masters like Pushkin and Gogol were disappearing from libraries across Europe. Now six defendants are being prosecuted.

items.title: U.K. Defense Secretary Resigns, in a Blow to Starmer
items.summary: John Healey unexpectedly announced that he was stepping down, saying Prime Minister Keir Starmer was failing to invest enough money in the British military.

items.title: This Is Mexico and Canada’s World Cup, Too. Don’t Expect Unity.

items.title: Monero price rockets 33% to $438 amid $120 million onchain laundering maze
items.summary: Onchain sleuth ZachXBT traced remaining funds across exchanges, instant swap services and other blockchains. Tether later froze $72 million in USDT linked to the activity.
items.title_zh: 价值 1.2 亿美元的链上洗钱迷宫中，门罗币价格飙升 33% 至 438 美元
items.summary_zh: 链上侦探 ZachXBT 追踪了交易所、即时交换服务和其他区块链上的剩余资金。 Tether 随后冻结了与该活动相关的 7200 万美元 USDT。

items.title: Former SEC, CFTC Chair Gary Gensler argues that prediction markets don't overrule state regulations
items.summary: The former regulator joined a number of interest groups in arguing that prediction markets are overstepping their bounds by offering sports-related contracts.
